name: Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla; mix well.
5. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients.
6. Stir in cinnamon, ginger, and cloves.
7. Roll dough into 1-inch balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Let cool on wire rack before serving.
